PostcodesioR v0.3.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction
  • Changelog

Nearest outcodes given longitude and latitude

Source: R/nearest_outcode_lonlat.R
nearest_outcode_lonlat.Rd

Returns nearest outward codes for a given longitude and latitude. The search is based on the relative distance of the outcode centroid.

nearest_outcode_lonlat(longitude, latitude)

Arguments

longitude

A string or numeric. Needs to have at least three decimal points.
latitude

A string or numeric. Needs to have at least three decimal points.

Value

A list with available data.

See also

postcode_lookup for documentation.

Examples

# \donttest{
nearest_outcode_lonlat(0.127, 51.507)

#> [[1]]
#> [[1]]$outcode
#> [1] "DA18"
#> 
#> [[1]]$longitude
#> [1] 0.1361685
#> 
#> [[1]]$latitude
#> [1] 51.49429
#> 
#> [[1]]$northings
#> [1] 179424
#> 
#> [[1]]$eastings
#> [1] 548389
#> 
#> [[1]]$admin_district
#> [[1]]$admin_district[[1]]
#> [1] "Bexley"
#> 
#> 
#> [[1]]$parish
#> [[1]]$parish[[1]]
#> [1] "Bexley, unparished area"
#> 
#> 
#> [[1]]$admin_county
#> list()
#> 
#> [[1]]$admin_ward
#> [[1]]$admin_ward[[1]]
#> [1] "Thamesmead East"
#> 
#> [[1]]$admin_ward[[2]]
#> [1] "Slade Green & Northend"
#> 
#> 
#> [[1]]$country
#> [[1]]$country[[1]]
#> [1] "England"
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [[2]]$outcode
#> [1] "SE28"
#> 
#> [[2]]$longitude
#> [1] 0.1044445
#> 
#> [[2]]$latitude
#> [1] 51.50235
#> 
#> [[2]]$northings
#> [1] 180257
#> 
#> [[2]]$eastings
#> [1] 546161
#> 
#> [[2]]$admin_district
#> [[2]]$admin_district[[1]]
#> [1] "Greenwich"
#> 
#> [[2]]$admin_district[[2]]
#> [1] "Bexley"
#> 
#> 
#> [[2]]$parish
#> [[2]]$parish[[1]]
#> [1] "Bexley, unparished area"
#> 
#> [[2]]$parish[[2]]
#> [1] "Greenwich, unparished area"
#> 
#> 
#> [[2]]$admin_county
#> list()
#> 
#> [[2]]$admin_ward
#> [[2]]$admin_ward[[1]]
#> [1] "Plumstead"
#> 
#> [[2]]$admin_ward[[2]]
#> [1] "Glyndon"
#> 
#> [[2]]$admin_ward[[3]]
#> [1] "Thamesmead East"
#> 
#> [[2]]$admin_ward[[4]]
#> [1] "Thamesmead Moorings"
#> 
#> 
#> [[2]]$country
#> [[2]]$country[[1]]
#> [1] "England"
#> 
#> 
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [[3]]$outcode
#> [1] "SE2"
#> 
#> [[3]]$longitude
#> [1] 0.1159346
#>

#> [1] "England"

#> [1] "DA17"
